questions.q: As of May 2, 2026, the US military reached deals with seven tech companies to use their AI on classified systems. Which prominent company was labeled a supply-chain risk and excluded?
On May 2, 2026, it was reported that Huawei expects its AI chip revenue to jump to $12 billion this year, largely driven by mass production of which processor?
Which company announced on May 2, 2026, that it secured a U.S. Patent for its graph-based conversational-flow editing technology to democratize AI agent creation?
Despite a cautious outlook for the smartphone market, which Taiwanese fabless semiconductor company announced on May 2, 2026, that it is lifting its ASIC target to $2 billion?
